overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character exploring a foggy neon-lit urban environment at night. The sequence transitions from a narrow residential alley to a waterfront plaza with lounge chairs, featuring futuristic architecture, holographic billboards, and a dystopian atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential alley with utility poles and trash bags

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a foggy narrow alley between residential buildings, passing piles of trash bags

entered.detail: low-rise concrete residential structures with small windows and balconies
crisscrossing electrical wires spanning the alley overhead
piles of blue and white garbage bags stacked on the sidewalk
tall pole with warm yellow light illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow foggy alley at night, flanked by residential buildings. The camera moves forward past piles of trash bags and under crisscrossing power lines, with street lamps casting a warm glow through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor lounge area under elevated highway

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza with lounge furniture under overpass
character with red hair stands up from lounge chair and begins moving

agents.ego_description: navigating through the lounge area, observing the futuristic furniture and neon lighting

notable_agents.action: character with red hair and blue jacket sitting on lounge chair then standing up

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway structure with metal railings spanning overhead
futuristic white and red lounge chairs arranged in clusters
tall metal canopy structures with red neon lighting at the base
vertical illuminated billboards with red and white text

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a semi-covered plaza beneath an elevated highway, featuring futuristic lounge chairs and red-lit umbrella structures. A character with red hair is seen sitting on a chair before standing up as the camera explores the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with view of downtown skyline

events.description: moves from covered plaza to open waterfront edge with city view
camera pans upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and floating vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge while looking up at the illuminated skyscrapers and neon billboards

notable_agents.action: character wearing a hat with a flashlight walking along the waterfront

entered.detail: dark reflective water surface with gentle ripples
massive illuminated tower with geometric patterns and vertical lighting
large holographic advertisements with bright colors on building facades
small flying car hovering in the sky between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto an open waterfront promenade with a panoramic view of the futuristic city skyline. The scene features dark water reflecting the neon lights of massive skyscrapers, with a floating vehicle visible in the sky and a character with a flashlight walking along the edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza interior with graffiti walls and concrete stairs

events.description: turns back from waterfront and re-enters the covered plaza area
approaches concrete stairway with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: moving back through the lounge area toward a concrete stairway, passing graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back from the waterfront and moves through the plaza toward a concrete stairway. The area features graffiti-covered walls and scattered lounge chairs, with the overpass structure still visible overhead as the segment ends at the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, foggy alleyway into an expansive, neon-lit waterfront plaza. It begins by pushing forward through a narrow residential passage flanked by trash bags and crisscrossing power lines, where warm street lamps pierce through a thick haze. As the camera emerges from the alley, the environment opens into a semi-covered plaza beneath an elevated highway, passing red-lit umbrella structures and a red-haired character rising from a futuristic lounge chair. The scene then expands further onto an open promenade, revealing a panoramic city skyline with massive skyscrapers reflecting in dark water and a floating vehicle drifting across the sky. Finally, the camera turns away from the waterfront to move back through the graffiti-covered plaza, gliding past scattered furniture toward a concrete stairway beneath the looming overpass.
